csharpCode: using UnityEngine; public class Script : UnityEditor.Editor { public static string Main() { try { var netMgr = FL.Gameplay.Manager.NetManager.Instance; if (netMgr == null) return "NetManager null - game not initialized"; return "NetManager exists, IsConnected=" + netMgr.IsConnected; } catch (System.Exception ex) { return "Error: " + ex.Message; } } }
